title: Discrimination: A plaintiff in a discrimination case must demonstrate which of...
summary: Identify what a plaintiff must demonstrate in a discrimination case.
prompt: A plaintiff in a discrimination case must demonstrate which of the following?

options.text: In a discrimination case, the plaintiff must demonstrate the burden of proof to
One plaintiff's proof suffices for all

solution: In a discrimination case, the plaintiff must demonstrate the burden of proof to establish that discrimination occurred. This involves showing that the accused's actions were discriminatory and not just a result of other factors. The burden is on the complainant to substantiate their claim.
